feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Landed cost list not showing while copying from Landed cost
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We have created a GRPO. Based on Multiple Landed costs are created. Now we need to reverse one of the landed costs. We need to create a landed cost based on the original landed cost. But in the list landed costs are not showing.
 
We have checked the same in the latest version it is showing.
 
Current SAP Version: 9.3  PL: 14 
 
Please share your observation.
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: HiCan we install SAP Business One Web Client on a server different from the main SQL Server ?
entry.content:
Hi
Can we install SAP Business One Web Client on a server different from the main SQL Server?
We have an SQL server connected to a gateway server through which users access SAP B1 Client as both servers are connected. Can we install Web Client as a component directly onto Gateway Server building a connection with SQL?

When I tried to do via main setup run i found no databases to connect

Please help

entry.title: "Document is not electronic; electronic data cannot be entered."
entry.content:
Hello,

I've referred to the video in the following URL "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j-2x-2Y7GGk" and deployed the Supplier Invoice Upload for Intelligent Invoice Scanning Bot (2R1) Template App. The trigger too ran successfully. Everything looked good on the BPA end, but when the process entered the Business One Phase of the process is when I have started facing a serious issue which is not letting me to complete the process.

 

Here are the details step wise.

1. I've opened the Electronic Document Import Wizard and located my invoice as I've selected the checkbox Determined and I have seen a message that stated the "Import file has been successfully determined".

2. I've clicked the drop down on the selected invoice and was able to see the invoice items successfully without any issues.

3. As suggested in the video, I have selected the option to generate all the rows and clicked next.

4. Then I have entered the summary report window that had my draft report and as I clicked on t, I was able to see the A/P Invoice - Draft. But when I have tried to save it, I got an error message which really is out of my understanding. Here's the message "Document is not electronic; electronic data cannot be entered."

I've searched online to see if anyone has ever faced such an issue, but I couldn't find any leads, so decided to post it here for expert advice.

Can anyone please take a look at this and explain where things are falling out of place.

I've attached two images to explain what I'm exactly seeing on my screen. 

 

Thanks in advance,

Gautham

entry.title: Exchange Rate Differences show incorrect amount
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When running Exchange Rate Differences, one of the accounts includes transactions without FC conversion. While another account excludes the without FC conversion. 

Can you please advise why this is happening?

Thank you.

entry.title: One Delivery and 2 Separate Sales Invoices - SAP Business One V10 FP2108 SQL
entry.content:
AdvanceOne Limited

Raju Parmar (raju@aoneafrica.com)

SAP Business One Version 10 FP 2108 – MSSQL 2017

We have a Government Requirement as follows:

One Delivery is made to a Government Agency of Item A 100 Units.

During Invoicing 2 separate Sales Invoices should be made as follows:

70% (70 Units) of the Invoice Value should go to theDistrict (Customer X) with PriceList 02 and

30% (30 Units) of Invoice Value should go to Government Agency (Customer Y) with PriceList 03.

Both the Sales Invoices A) and B) should reference to the same Delivery.

Has anyone come across such a scenario or have a work around.

Any assistance will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Draft Conversion Triggers Duplicate Approval in SAP Business One Service Layer
entry.content:
Problem Statement: Draft Conversion Triggers Duplicate Approval in SAP Business One Service Layer

Hello SAP Community,

I’m encountering an issue with the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service in SAP Business One, and I’m hoping someone can provide guidance or a solution.

Scenario:

  • System: SAP Business One (Service Layer)
  • Process: Converting a draft Approved Purchase Order (PO) to a final document

Issue:

When I use the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service to convert an approved draft PO to a final document, it triggers the approval process again. Here’s the detailed workflow:

  1. Create a PO: The PO draft is created and submitted for approval.
  2. Approval Process: The PO draft goes through the approval process and is approved.
  3. Convert Draft to Document: I use the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service to convert the approved draft to a final document.
  4. Re-trigger Approval: The conversion process re-triggers the approval, and I have to approve it again. Only after the second approval does the document get saved by calling DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument.

Observations:

  • The approval template is set to “Always” check for approvals.
  • The document status before conversion is fully approved.

Payload Example:

Here is the JSON payload I am using for the conversion:

 

{
  "Document": {
    "DocEntry": 12345
}
}

 

Steps Taken:

  • Verified that the approval template settings are correct and do not have duplicate conditions.
  • Ensured the draft status is fully approved before conversion.

General Settings

Template Settings

SAP Version

 

 

Question:

Has anyone experienced similar issues with the DraftsService_SaveDraftToDocument service? How can I prevent the approval process from being re-triggered upon conversion of the approved draft to a final document?

Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

@ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: GST Place of Supply - Export - SAPB1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a Sales Order for an Export supply of goods in SAP-B1 10.0 FP2022

But here is a customer who is out of India, address has been properly defined in BP.

There is a field where Place of Supply needs to be defined. Ideally it gets populated based on the Ship To address of the BP as States have been defined,

but in this case when I try to fill in the value, the List of States opens up and shows all Indian states

Upon clicking New, States-Setup window opens up, where there is no option to define anything out of India

How do I post a qualified Sales Order for an Export?

Thanks

entry.title: SQL query for Business Partners
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP experts, I am new to SAP B1 and I need help with SQL query, Business Parner statistics. How can I output in tabular form the following columns that belong to all BPs on the first date of this month up to this date:
GroupCode,
The balance due on the first day of the month,
The sum of invoice DocTotals for this month,
Sum of Incoming Payments from this BP this month,
CurrentAccountBalance,
This BP is the sales person code

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: B1Siteuser prompt to reset password to activate b1siteuser
entry.content:
HI,

Recently i encounter in SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.220) SP 2308 and 10.0 PL2305 HANA,

When i login to extension manager web > key in B1SiteUser as user > it prompt me new password and confirm new password screen.

There is a red note 'change password to active your account' I not able to proceed to SLD too without changing the password.

B1SiteUser is not lock and i am not adding new user in the authentication management.

I found change log in Change Log 10.0 FP 2405 but when i click on 'Activating B1SiteUser' it is page not found.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_IAM/548d6202b2b6491b824a488cfc447343/dc03c11adaaa4e6a910b6a73ab8b03e9.html?version=10.0_FP_2405

Please help thank you.

Reconfiguring Identity and Authentication ManagementThe topics about activating B1SiteUser in the authentication service are restructured.Activating B1SiteUser

entry.title: Can edit the Alert Management in bulk?
entry.content: I had created 98 Alert for Purchase Request Reports. Now want to edit the Alert Message timing and date. Can I edit it in one shot??

entry.title: Error en Query - Facturas pagas en plazo (60 días)
entry.content:
Hola expertos!! Estoy haciendo una query que me muestre una lista de facturas que se han pagado en un plazo determinado. Hay algunas lineas de la query que me salen repetidas y no entiendo por que

Intuyo que es algo en la vinculacion con los pagos pero en las lineas repetidas salen pagos que no son ni del mismo cliente de la factura. 

Se os ocurre que puedo cambiar o que he puesto mal?

Gracias!!!

SELECT DISTINCT
    T2."DocNum",
    T2."DocEntry" AS "Navegar a factura",
    T4."SeriesName",
    T2."DocStatus",
    T2."TaxDate" as "Fecha de documento",
    T2."CardCode",
    T2."CardName",
    (T2."DocTotal" - T2."VatSum") AS "Total Sin IVA",
    T2."DocTotal",
    T2."PaidToDate",
    T9."DocNum" AS "Numero de Documento de Pago",
    T9."DocDate" AS "Fecha de contabilización de Pago",
    CASE 
        WHEN T9."DocDate" IS NOT NULL THEN ''
        ELSE T7."LineMemo"
    END AS "Comentario Linea Asiento",
    CASE 
        WHEN T9."DocDate" IS NOT NULL THEN ''
        ELSE T11."RefDate"
    END AS "Fecha Pago Asiento",
    T6."BPLName",
    CASE
        WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T2."TaxDate", T9."DocDate") IS NOT NULL THEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T2."TaxDate", T9."DocDate")
        ELSE DAYS_BETWEEN(T2."TaxDate", T11."RefDate")
        END AS "DiasPago",
    CASE
         WHEN CASE                 
                  WHEN T9."DocDate" IS NOT NULL THEN DAYS_BETWEEN(T2."TaxDate", T9."DocDate")
                 ELSE DAYS_BETWEEN(T2."TaxDate", T11."RefDate")
                 END < 60 THEN 'OK'
        ELSE 'NO'
    END AS "MENOS60"

FROM OPDN T0 
LEFT JOIN PDN1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"  
RIGHT JOIN OPCH T2 ON T1."BaseEntry" = T2."DocEntry" 
LEFT JOIN PCH1 T3 ON T2."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry"  
INNER JOIN NNM1 T4 ON T2."Series" = T4."Series" 
INNER JOIN OSLP T5 ON T2."SlpCode" = T5."SlpCode" 
INNER JOIN OBPL T6 ON T2."BPLId" = T6."BPLId" 
LEFT JOIN JDT1 T7 ON T7."TransId" = T2."TransId" 
LEFT JOIN VPM2 T8 ON T8."DocEntry" = T2."DocEntry"  
LEFT JOIN OVPM T9 ON (T9."DocEntry" = T8."DocNum")
LEFT JOIN OACT T10 ON T7."Account" = T10."AcctCode" 
LEFT JOIN OJDT T11 ON T7."TransId" = T11."TransId" 

WHERE T2."CANCELED" = 'N'
  AND T6."BPLName" Like '%%[%0]%%'
  AND YEAR(T2."TaxDate") = 2023

ORDER BY
T2."DocNum"

entry.title: Database automatically get removed from SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are facing an issue in the SAP where the existing databases are removed automatically.

We had restarted the Services of SAP & SQL and also restarted the Database & Application server. 

But we are persisting with the same issue after login to SAP where the database automatically disappears.

Please let us know the reason why it was happening and share the workaround.

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

entry.title: DTW template for Forecast screen in MRP Module in SAP Business One
entry.content: I am attempting to upload the 2024 forecast using DTW for the Forecast screen under MRP Modules in MRP. However, I am encountering an issue while using DTW: I am unable to upload for the months of January to December, as they are all denoted to the Quantity field. I am looking for a way to enter the amount allocated to the Quantity field for the months of June to December; I can't do it in a single field. Can anyone offer assistance with this issue? Thank you.

entry.title: ESD (Cash Discount) Process for Greece Localization Specific
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would greatly value your assistance in comprehending the handling of Cash Discounts in SAP B1 for the Greece localization. It is evident that SAP's behavior in Greece differs from that in our other landscapes. For instance, let's compare two SAP databases: UK and GR:

Take into account an AP Invoice with a net amount of EUR 100, a VAT of 20%, and a 3% Cash Discount if payment is made at least 30 days before the due date.

In the UK Loc. we get:

AccountDebitCredit
Supplier 120
Input VAT20 
Expense100 

UK Payment 

AccountDebitCreditComments
Bank 116.40 
Input VAT 0.60VAT Adjustment (20 - 3%)
Cash Discount Account 3.00 
Supplier120  

Whereas in GR:

AccountDebitCreditComments
Supplier 119.4 
Input VAT19.4 Base Amount reduced by 3%
Expense100  

GR Payment:

AccountDebitCredit
Bank 116.4
Cash Discount Account 3.00
Supplier119.4 

To summarize, the UK invoice is recorded as standard, and the cash discount plus VAT adjustment are only posted upon payment of the invoice. This is logical since we cannot apply a discount at the time of invoicing without knowing if the invoice will be paid within the discount period.

Conversely, in Greece, SAP applies the discount directly on the invoice by reducing the VAT base amount by 3%, effectively making an advance VAT adjustment. This approach seems incorrect as no discount should be calculated at this stage. Although the VAT amount appears accurate if paid within the discount period, reconciling the rest of the process could be challenging.

We have not found any settings in SAP to alter this behaviour, nor is there any SAP documentation that explains this procedure in Greece. It appears we may be overlooking some steps, so any guidance on the correct handling of this would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

G.

entry.title: Need to access add button in system message popup when opening Incoming Payment through code.
entry.content: I need to add the incoming payment but unable to access add button in  system popup message in c# code. Is there is a way to get the access to that pop up system message or we can restrict the pop up from opening.

entry.title: Incoming payment from a multi-currencues BP
entry.content:
I have 3 invoices for a MC BP. 100 USD . 1000 EURO and 1000 GBP. if the customer wants to pay these invoices in a Local Currency. EGY . how can I do it from the incoming payment document. can the system relize the exchange rate differences. how about the Total Amount Due (****) .. will the system use a total mount or amount due based on the (local currency and exchange rate) from these 3 document. there is something got me here I can't get it . 

from the payment means .. what will be the document amount .. and how is gonna be distribute among the open docs ..

entry.title: how to make line of business mandatory in incoming payment if that row is selected.
entry.content:
Dear Expert

How to make LINE OF BUSINESS mandatory in incoming payment if row is selected. 

please help .

entry.title: SAP B1 10 why items weight and size are mandatory?
entry.content:
On SAP B1 9.x we could create an item and not fill the weight and size.
With SAP B1 10, it looks like it is mandatory.

It is not convenient, so am I missing a configuration specification that would allow us to create an item with empty size and weight? or is it really mandatory?

entry.title: In Inventory Audit report and Inventory Aging report Values are not Matching
entry.content:
Dear Team,
 
We are checking SAP standard report, Inventory Audit report and Inventory Aging report.
 
Both the reports should match Quantity-wise and Value wise.
 
In our case, it matches with Quantity but the value is not matching.
 
We have checked the following SAP Notes.
 
3221488 - The Cumulative Value in the Inventory Audit Report Is Not Equal to the Total Value in the Inventory Aging Report.
3050253 - Inventory Aging Report Displays Wrong Value
2852781 - Incorrect Value in Inventory Aging Report
3335660 - Inventory Aging Report Does Not Consider Inventory Revaluation
1891471 - Inventory aging report displays incorrect value
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: SAP Crypto DLL filling disk space
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have recently upgraded to SAP B1 FP2405. 

Now we find that a certain directory is being filled every 30secs with a DLL file from SAP. It's chewed up 150GB+ in a few days. 

What could be causing this?
